name: multi-turn-scale-change
description: Multi-turn: change axis scales to log
messages: Scatter plot of GDP vs population
Use a log scale for both axes
rubric: Final chart must be a scatter/dot plot with gdp_billions on one axis and population_millions on the other. Both axes must use log scale (type: 'log'). Data points should be spread out (not clustered in corner as with linear scale).
